message:
fix: fire OnCompactionTurn callback and use TurnCheckpoint in all strategies

Three context strategies bypassed the OnCompactionTurn callback, so
compaction turns they produced were not recorded in the transcript.
Two strategies also created TurnUserInput instead of TurnCheckpoint
for checkpoint turns, making them indistinguishable from regular user
input in transcripts and history replay.

Fixes:
- ObsMaskStrategy: fire callback after checkpoint (layer 2)
- CheckpointPredStrategy: fire callback after checkpoint (layer 3)
  and summarize (layer 4); change predictiveCheckpoint() to create
  TurnCheckpoint instead of TurnUserInput
- SessionLogStrategy: fire callback after checkpoint (layer 3) and
  summarize (layer 4); change sessionLogCheckpoint() to create
  TurnCheckpoint instead of TurnUserInput

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
